creator: pavlo@cs.wisc.edu
text:
I have submitted a upgrade report for the "condor" port at least 3 times, and I never can seem to get a response. The last time that somebody did take ownership, it just sits as "open" and is never closed. I have tried emailing itetcu, but I did not get a reply.

Can somebody commit this so that I can submit a new update for the new version of Condor that came out in November?

Here is the original bug report:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=115646

Thank you.
